architecture_trends.description: Java is heavily utilized in cloud-native platforms via Spring Boot, Quarkus, and Micronaut due to robust security and enterprise stability.
Handling thousands of concurrent tasks efficiently; simplifying concurrency models.
Mainstream traction for fast startup and low memory footprint, ideal for scalable services.

ai_integration_trends.description: While Python leads in training, Java is the 'glue' for production AI deployment, scalability, and integration with traditional enterprise systems.
Frameworks like Spring AI and LangChain4j have matured, enabling robust interaction with LLM models, vector databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) paradigms.
Transitioning from experiments to robust enterprise deployments where autonomous agents interact using Java's robust transaction management.
AI copilot tools are standard in the Java development lifecycle for code suggestion, automated testing, and architectural improvements.
